name: Climate.Pid → Set Control Parameters
description: This action sets new values for the control parameters of the PID controller. This can be used to manually tune the PID controller. Make sure to take update the values you want on the YAML file! They will reset on the next reboot.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: ID of the PID Climate to start autotuning for.

config_entries.label: Kp
config_entries.description: The factor for the proportional term of the PID controller.

config_entries.label: Kd
config_entries.description: The factor for the derivative term of the PID controller. Defaults to `0`.

config_entries.label: Ki
config_entries.description: The factor for the integral term of the PID controller. Defaults to `0`.
